name: Premier Royalty, Inc.
description: Premier Royalty, Inc. was a Canadian-based company that specialized in acquiring royalty interests in mineral properties, focusing on companies with advanced-stage development projects or operating mines. The firm provided capital to mining operators in exchange for net smelter returns and other royalty streams. In 2013, Premier Royalty was acquired by Sandstorm Gold Ltd. in a transaction valued at approximately C$28.3 million. Following the acquisition, Premier Royalty became a subsidiary of Sandstorm Gold, further consolidating its portfolio of precious metal royalties within the broader streaming and royalty business model of the parent company.
